title: An Individual Interneuron Participates in Many Kinds of Inhibition and Innervates Much of the Mouse Visual Thalamus
abstract: Using serial section EM, we mapped 899 synaptic inputs and 623 outputs of a single inhibitory interneuron in the mouse visual thalamus, showing it participates in diverse inhibitory motifs and innervates a large territory.
notes: Morgan first author. Complete input/output mapping of a single interneuron.
